unit_description: 核心詞彙：寵物、照護、情感與語篇連接

words.hint: I liked the alpacas the most. They were so cute!
There were rabbits, goats and alpacas at this farm.
There were rabbits, goats and alpacas at this farm.
Marcus showed his mum a picture of a kitten.
Tucker is a chocolate Labradoodle.
A mongrel is a mixed-breed dog.
There are many stray animals without food or shelter.
He started working as a therapy dog at Independent Schools Foundation Academy in 2019.
People often prefer pure breeds to mongrels in Hong Kong.
Label the beak of the bird in the photo.
The parrot has very sharp claws, so we need to trim its nails.
The parrot has beautiful blue feathers.
We can see the fin of the fish sticking out of the water.
These medium-sized animals have very thick and soft fur.
The dog hurt its paw when running outside.
Fish are covered in small and smooth scales.
Every time someone pets him, he wags his tail.
He has the cutest whiskers on his face!
You can chat with birds and let them fly around with their wings.
He woofs at me when it’s time to get up.
Coco purred contentedly when Marcus brushed its fur.
The dog growled and barked at the robber.
I love to hear the cows mooing in the barn.
The pigs always oink when they see me coming.
Their baas cheer me up every morning.
She always miaows when she wants attention.
I sometimes hear a mouse squeak in the kitchen.
The birds tweet all morning long outside the window.
‘Can we adopt her?’ Marcus asked his mum excitedly.
We can foster the cat first, then decide if we adopt her.
Marcus and his parents looked after the cat together.
Marcus said while brushing Coco’s soft fur.
Remember to trim your dog’s nails regularly.
In the afternoon, we even fed one of the alpacas.
Dogs need plenty of exercise every day.
Never overfeed your pet, or it will become overweight.
Students can give Tucker treats when they interact with him.
Students can just cuddle with Tucker when they feel anxious.
Students can visit Tucker and interact with him at break.
The alpaca kept licking my hand when I fed her.
Even my youngest brother was tall enough to pet the alpacas.
If your pet scratches a lot, it may have fleas.
Dad and I decided to go to the vet right away.
My parents promised to visit an animal shelter with me.
Brush your pet’s fur to prevent knots.
Give your pet a bath with special shampoo if it has fleas.
Prevent fleas using special sprays or collars.
We put a soft collar on our new puppy.
That was fun, but kind of strange.
Coco purred contentedly while being brushed.
When students feel anxious, they can visit Tucker.
Marcus was shy and could not make any friends.
The cat became more confident after living with Marcus.
The cat in the photo is called Marbles. She was very friendly.
The curious kitten kept playing with the ball.
Dogs are cuddly and loving to their owners.
These medium-sized animals have very thick and soft fur.
He learnt how to be a responsible pet owner along the way.
Tucker is a wonderful companion for many students.
We got there right when it opened to avoid the crowds.
A memorable experience at Butterfly Valley.
If you are up for the challenge, dogs are great pets.
Tucker is a simple solution to students’ difficulties.
They invited friends over to welcome this new family member.
We need to avoid busy streets when walking the dogs.
Tucker even helped students overcome their fear of dogs.
Max heard the robber and started to bark loudly.
She gets grumpy and bites me in the evenings.
We bought a new toy for our dog at Christmas.
A German shepherd stopped a robbery on Saturday night.
At ten years old, I got my first pet.
I was really shocked at that moment.
On 1 February, we visited an animal shelter.
I taught my dog a new trick on Christmas Day.
In the afternoon, we even fed one of the alpacas.
In 2019, Tucker started working as a therapy dog.
We stayed there from 10 a.m. to 2 p.m.
Between June and August, I taught my rabbit a new trick.
In the beginning, the student was scared to go near Tucker.
In the end, we found the hamster under the bed.
A while later, Marcus noticed the cat was missing.
One day, Marcus showed his mum a picture of a kitten.
It happened suddenly that my cat got sick.
As a result, many mongrels end up on the street.
Petting a dog can help people feel calmer and more relaxed.
Students feel more relaxed after interacting with Tucker.
With a therapy dog around, students seem less stressed.
I was quite scared, but my dog was not afraid at all.
I was really shocked when the turtle bit my finger.
His parents were worried because he had no friends.
‘Can we adopt her?’ he asked excitedly.
I feel lonely at home as the only child.
She gets grumpy and bites me in the evenings.
Therapy dogs give emotional support to students by providing comfort.
Many students deal with exam worries and social challenges.
Therapy dogs provide comfort and emotional support to students.
Their baas cheer me up every morning.
I even checked on her a few times during the night.
The loud barking woke up the owner of the house.
A robber broke into a house and wanted to steal money.
The robber ran away when he heard the dog barking.
He shared photos of the small orange cat on social media.
They invited a few of Marcus’ friends over for a party.
They finally promised to visit an animal shelter with me.
In November, the family decided to adopt the cat.

sentences.english: I liked the alpacas the most. They were so cute!
sentences.translation: 我最喜歡羊駝。它們太可愛了！

sentences.english: There were rabbits, goats and alpacas at this farm.
sentences.translation: 這個農場裡有兔子、山羊和羊駝。

sentences.english: Marcus showed his mum a picture of a kitten.
sentences.translation: 馬庫斯給媽媽看了一張小貓的照片。

sentences.english: Tucker is a chocolate Labradoodle.
sentences.translation: 塔克是一隻巧克力色的拉布拉多貴賓犬。

sentences.english: A mongrel is a mixed-breed dog.
sentences.translation: 雜交犬是指混合品種的狗。

sentences.english: There are many stray animals without food or shelter.
sentences.translation: 有許多流浪動物沒有食物和棲身之所。

sentences.english: He started working as a therapy dog at Independent Schools Foundation Academy in 2019.
sentences.translation: 他於2019年開始在弘立書院擔任治療犬。

sentences.english: People often prefer pure breeds to mongrels in Hong Kong.
sentences.translation: 在香港，人們常常偏好純種犬多於雜交犬。

sentences.english: The parrot has very sharp claws, so we need to trim its nails.
sentences.translation: 這隻鸚鵡有非常鋒利的爪子，所以我們需要修剪它的指甲。

sentences.english: The parrot has beautiful blue feathers.
sentences.translation: 這隻鸚鵡有美麗的藍色羽毛。

sentences.english: We can see the fin of the fish sticking out of the water.
sentences.translation: 我們可以看到魚的鰭伸出水面。

sentences.english: These medium-sized animals have very thick and soft fur.
sentences.translation: 這些中型動物有非常濃密柔軟的毛髮。

sentences.english: The dog hurt its paw when running outside.
sentences.translation: 那隻狗在外面跑的時候弄傷了爪子。

sentences.english: Fish are covered in small and smooth scales.
sentences.translation: 魚身上覆蓋著細小光滑的鱗片。

sentences.english: Every time someone pets him, he wags his tail.
sentences.translation: 每次有人撫摸牠，牠都會搖尾巴。

sentences.english: He has the cutest whiskers on his face!
sentences.translation: 他臉上有最可愛的鬍鬚！

sentences.english: You can chat with birds and let them fly around with their wings.
sentences.translation: 你可以和鳥兒聊天，讓牠們展翅飛翔。

sentences.english: He woofs at me when it’s time to get up.
sentences.translation: 到了起床時間，牠就會對我汪汪叫。

sentences.english: Coco purred contentedly when Marcus brushed its fur.
sentences.translation: 當馬庫斯梳理可可的毛髮時，牠滿足地發出呼嚕聲。

sentences.english: The dog growled and barked at the robber.
sentences.translation: 那隻狗對著強盜低吼並吠叫。

sentences.english: I love to hear the cows mooing in the barn.
sentences.translation: 我喜歡聽牛在穀倉裡哞哞叫。

sentences.english: The pigs always oink when they see me coming.
sentences.translation: 那些豬看到我來的時候總是哼哼叫。

sentences.english: Their baas cheer me up every morning.
sentences.translation: 牠們的咩咩叫聲每天早上都讓我心情愉快。

sentences.english: She always miaows when she wants attention.
sentences.translation: 當牠想要關注時，總是喵喵叫。

sentences.english: I sometimes hear a mouse squeak in the kitchen.
sentences.translation: 我有時聽到廚房裡有老鼠吱吱叫。

sentences.english: The birds tweet all morning long outside the window.
sentences.translation: 鳥兒在窗外啾啾叫了整個早上。

sentences.english: 'Can we adopt her?' Marcus asked his mum excitedly.
sentences.translation: 「我們可以領養她嗎？」馬庫斯興奮地問媽媽。

sentences.english: We can foster the cat first, then decide if we adopt her.
sentences.translation: 我們可以先寄養這隻貓，然後再決定是否領養牠。

sentences.english: Marcus and his parents looked after the cat together.
sentences.translation: 馬庫斯和他的父母一起照顧那隻貓。

sentences.english: Marcus said while brushing Coco's soft fur.
sentences.translation: 馬庫斯一邊梳理可可柔軟的毛髮一邊說道。

sentences.english: Remember to trim your dog's nails regularly.
sentences.translation: 記得定期修剪你的狗的指甲。

sentences.english: In the afternoon, we even fed one of the alpacas.
sentences.translation: 下午，我們甚至餵了其中一隻羊駝。

sentences.english: Dogs need plenty of exercise every day.
sentences.translation: 狗每天需要大量的運動。

sentences.english: Never overfeed your pet, or it will become overweight.
sentences.translation: 切勿過度餵食你的寵物，否則牠會過重。

sentences.english: Students can give Tucker treats when they interact with him.
sentences.translation: 學生與塔克互動時可以給他零食獎勵。

sentences.english: Students can just cuddle with Tucker when they feel anxious.
sentences.translation: 學生感到焦慮時可以直接擁抱塔克。

sentences.english: Students can visit Tucker and interact with him at break.
sentences.translation: 學生可以在休息時間探望塔克並與他互動。

sentences.english: The alpaca kept licking my hand when I fed her.
sentences.translation: 當我餵那隻羊駝時，牠不停地舔我的手。

sentences.english: Even my youngest brother was tall enough to pet the alpacas.
sentences.translation: 連我最小的弟弟都夠高可以撫摸羊駝。

sentences.english: If your pet scratches a lot, it may have fleas.
sentences.translation: 如果你的寵物經常抓癢，可能身上有跳蚤。

sentences.english: Dad and I decided to go to the vet right away.
sentences.translation: 爸爸和我決定立刻去看獸醫。

sentences.english: My parents promised to visit an animal shelter with me.
sentences.translation: 我的父母答應和我一起去動物收容所。

sentences.english: Brush your pet's fur to prevent knots.
sentences.translation: 梳理寵物的毛髮以防止打結。

sentences.english: Give your pet a bath with special shampoo if it has fleas.
sentences.translation: 如果你的寵物有跳蚤，請用特殊洗髮精給牠洗澡。

sentences.english: Prevent fleas using special sprays or collars.
sentences.translation: 使用特殊噴霧或項圈預防跳蚤。

sentences.english: We put a soft collar on our new puppy.
sentences.translation: 我們給我們的新小狗戴上了一個柔軟的項圈。

sentences.english: That was fun, but kind of strange.
sentences.translation: 那很有趣，但有點奇怪。

sentences.english: Coco purred contentedly while being brushed.
sentences.translation: 可可被梳理時滿足地發出呼嚕聲。

sentences.english: When students feel anxious, they can visit Tucker.
sentences.translation: 當學生感到焦慮時，他們可以探望塔克。

sentences.english: Marcus was shy and could not make any friends.
sentences.translation: 馬庫斯很害羞，交不到任何朋友。

sentences.english: The cat became more confident after living with Marcus.
sentences.translation: 那隻貓和馬庫斯一起生活後變得更有自信。

sentences.english: The cat in the photo is called Marbles. She was very friendly.
sentences.translation: 照片中的貓叫馬布爾斯。她非常友善。

sentences.english: The curious kitten kept playing with the ball.
sentences.translation: 那隻好奇的小貓不停地玩球。

sentences.english: Dogs are cuddly and loving to their owners.
sentences.translation: 狗對主人很親密且充滿愛意。

sentences.english: These medium-sized animals have very thick and soft fur.
sentences.translation: 這些中型動物有非常濃密柔軟的毛髮。

sentences.english: He learnt how to be a responsible pet owner along the way.
sentences.translation: 在這過程中，他學會了如何成為一個負責任的寵物主人。

sentences.english: Tucker is a wonderful companion for many students.
sentences.translation: 塔克是許多學生的絕佳夥伴。

sentences.english: We got there right when it opened to avoid the crowds.
sentences.translation: 我們在開放時正好到達，以避開人群。

sentences.english: A memorable experience at Butterfly Valley.
sentences.translation: 在蝴蝶谷的一次難忘經歷。

sentences.english: If you are up for the challenge, dogs are great pets.
sentences.translation: 如果你準備好接受挑戰，狗是很棒的寵物。

sentences.english: Tucker is a simple solution to students' difficulties.
sentences.translation: 塔克是學生困難的簡單解決方案。

sentences.english: They invited friends over to welcome this new family member.
sentences.translation: 他們邀請朋友來家裡歡迎這個新家庭成員。

sentences.english: We need to avoid busy streets when walking the dogs.
sentences.translation: 我們遛狗時需要避開繁忙的街道。

sentences.english: Tucker even helped students overcome their fear of dogs.
sentences.translation: 塔克甚至幫助學生克服了對狗的恐懼。

sentences.english: Max heard the robber and started to bark loudly.
sentences.translation: 麥克斯聽到強盜的聲音，開始大聲吠叫。

sentences.english: She gets grumpy and bites me in the evenings.
sentences.translation: 牠晚上會變得暴躁並咬我。

sentences.english: We bought a new toy for our dog at Christmas.
sentences.translation: 我們在聖誕節給我們的狗買了一個新玩具。

sentences.english: A German shepherd stopped a robbery on Saturday night.
sentences.translation: 一隻德國牧羊犬在週六晚上阻止了一場搶劫。

sentences.english: At ten years old, I got my first pet.
sentences.translation: 十歲時，我得到了我的第一隻寵物。

sentences.english: I was really shocked at that moment.
sentences.translation: 在那一刻，我真的很震驚。

sentences.english: On 1 February, we visited an animal shelter.
sentences.translation: 2月1日，我們參觀了動物收容所。

sentences.english: I taught my dog a new trick on Christmas Day.
sentences.translation: 我在聖誕節當天教了我的狗一個新把戲。

sentences.english: In the afternoon, we even fed one of the alpacas.
sentences.translation: 下午，我們甚至餵了其中一隻羊駝。

sentences.english: In 2019, Tucker started working as a therapy dog.
sentences.translation: 2019年，塔克開始擔任治療犬。

sentences.english: We stayed there from 10 a.m. to 2 p.m.
sentences.translation: 我們從上午10點到下午2點待在那裡。

sentences.english: Between June and August, I taught my rabbit a new trick.
sentences.translation: 六月到八月之間，我教了我的兔子一個新把戲。

sentences.english: In the beginning, the student was scared to go near Tucker.
sentences.translation: 一開始，那個學生害怕靠近塔克。

sentences.english: In the end, we found the hamster under the bed.
sentences.translation: 最後，我們在床底下找到了倉鼠。

sentences.english: A while later, Marcus noticed the cat was missing.
sentences.translation: 過了一會兒，馬庫斯發現貓不見了。

sentences.english: One day, Marcus showed his mum a picture of a kitten.
sentences.translation: 有一天，馬庫斯給媽媽看了一張小貓的照片。

sentences.english: It happened suddenly that my cat got sick.
sentences.translation: 突然間，我的貓就生病了。

sentences.english: As a result, many mongrels end up on the street.
sentences.translation: 結果，許多雜交犬最終流落街頭。

sentences.english: Petting a dog can help people feel calmer and more relaxed.
sentences.translation: 撫摸狗可以幫助人們感到更平靜和放鬆。

sentences.english: Students feel more relaxed after interacting with Tucker.
sentences.translation: 學生與塔克互動後感到更放鬆。

sentences.english: With a therapy dog around, students seem less stressed.
sentences.translation: 有治療犬在身邊，學生們似乎壓力較小。

sentences.english: I was quite scared, but my dog was not afraid at all.
sentences.translation: 我很害怕，但我的狗一點也不怕。

sentences.english: I was really shocked when the turtle bit my finger.
sentences.translation: 當烏龜咬我的手指時，我真的很震驚。

sentences.english: His parents were worried because he had no friends.
sentences.translation: 他的父母很擔心，因為他沒有朋友。

sentences.english: 'Can we adopt her?' he asked excitedly.
sentences.translation: 「我們可以領養她嗎？」他興奮地問。

sentences.english: I feel lonely at home as the only child.
sentences.translation: 作為獨生子，我在家感到孤獨。

sentences.english: She gets grumpy and bites me in the evenings.
sentences.translation: 牠晚上會變得暴躁並咬我。

sentences.english: Therapy dogs give emotional support to students by providing comfort.
sentences.translation: 治療犬通過提供安慰給學生情感支持。

sentences.english: Many students deal with exam worries and social challenges.
sentences.translation: 許多學生應對考試焦慮和社交挑戰。

sentences.english: Therapy dogs provide comfort and emotional support to students.
sentences.translation: 治療犬為學生提供安慰和情感支持。

sentences.english: Their baas cheer me up every morning.
sentences.translation: 牠們的咩咩叫聲每天早上都讓我心情愉快。

sentences.english: I even checked on her a few times during the night.
sentences.translation: 我甚至在夜裡查看過牠幾次。

sentences.english: The loud barking woke up the owner of the house.
sentences.translation: 大聲的吠叫吵醒了房子的主人。

sentences.english: A robber broke into a house and wanted to steal money.
sentences.translation: 一個強盜闖入一間房子想要偷錢。

sentences.english: The robber ran away when he heard the dog barking.
sentences.translation: 強盜聽到狗叫聲就逃跑了。

sentences.english: He shared photos of the small orange cat on social media.
sentences.translation: 他在社交媒體上分享了那隻小橘貓的照片。

sentences.english: They invited a few of Marcus' friends over for a party.
sentences.translation: 他們邀請了馬庫斯的幾個朋友來參加派對。

sentences.english: They finally promised to visit an animal shelter with me.
sentences.translation: 他們終於答應和我一起去動物收容所。

sentences.english: In November, the family decided to adopt the cat.
sentences.translation: 十一月，這家人決定領養那隻貓。
